targets.query:
from(bucket: "SMesh")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "environment")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.fromNode == "${node}")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "ch3Voltage")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with sensor: if r.sensor == "powerMetrics" then "Power Metrics" else if r.sensor == "airQualityMetrics" then "Air Quality Metrics" else if r.sensor == "environmentMetrics" then "Environment Metrics" else r.sensor }))
  |> yield(name: "mean")
